title: elaeagnus crispa var. rotundifolia
intro: Elaeagnus crispa var. rotundifolia, also known as Roundleaf Silverberry, is a type of flowering shrub native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elaeagnus crispa var. rotundifolia include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and act as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in traditional Asian medicine to treat various health conditions.
